# Nadav Cohen — Full-Stack AI Developer

> Israeli software developer specializing in AI-powered full-stack development.
> Creator of enterprise systems, AI orchestration engines, and production applications.
> Primary domain: nadavc.ai

## About
Nadav Cohen (נדב כהן) is an Israeli full-stack developer who builds everything with AI.
Based in Israel, he specializes in React, Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase, Flutter, and AI agent orchestration.
He has built 10+ production applications, 86 AI skills, and 52 automation agents.

## Core Projects
- [Mexicani](https://nadavc.ai/he#projects): Enterprise franchise management system — 149 pages, 111 database tables, 38 Edge Functions. Branch, order, inventory, and employee management.
- [Cash Control](https://github.com/Nadav011/Z): Delivery management PWA with full offline support, smart sync, IndexedDB, and operation queuing.
- [Shifts](https://github.com/Nadav011/mexicani-shifts): Shift management system with Drag & Drop, Push notifications, and interactive scheduling. 154 components, 25 hooks.
- [APEX Engine](https://nadavc.ai/he#projects): Code audit engine with 579 gates, auto-healing, automatic technology detection, and a 10x7 visual matrix.
- [SportChat](https://github.com/Nadav011/sportchat-ultimate): Real-time sports community app built with Flutter, featuring live chat, missions, and social features.
- [APEX Dashboard](https://github.com/Nadav011/apex-dashboard): APEX Command Center — full management dashboard for AI Dev Stack. 32 pages, PWA, real-time monitoring, Hydra v2. React + Cloudflare Pages.
- [APEX CLI](https://github.com/Nadav011/apex-cli): Command-line interface for 13 management commands, integrating Hydra v2, LangGraph, and 86 Skills. TypeScript + Bun.
- [RTL First Dev Kit](https://github.com/Nadav011/rtl-first-dev-kit): RTL-first component library for Hebrew development. Tailwind 4.2 logical properties, a11y, i18n. Open Source.

## Technical Expertise
- Frontend: React 19, Next.js 16, TypeScript 5.9, Tailwind CSS 4
- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL, RLS, Edge Functions), Hono
- Mobile: Flutter 3.41, Capacitor
- AI: Claude Code, Multi-agent orchestration (LangGraph, Hydra v2), AI SDK 6, LanceDB cognitive memory
- DevOps: GitHub Actions, Cloudflare Pages, Docker

## Services
- Full-Stack Web Application Development
- AI Agent Development & Orchestration
- Enterprise Software Systems
- Mobile App Development (Flutter, Capacitor)
- Automation & AI Integration Solutions
